notices.ggnrStr:
<p style="text-align: center;">Idioms Story:&nbsp;Graffiti Makes Him See Red</p> 
  <p>Using the words and expressions given, tell a story according to the pictures given. Then recite the provided story fluently.&nbsp;</p>

<p style="text-align: center;"><em><strong>Vocabulary Workbook IV&nbsp;(12,000+ word level)</strong></em></p> 
  <p>While you're studying Unit 1, Vocabulary Workbook IV (12,000+ word level) to get ready for Week 3 achievement test, please listen to the recordings (MP3) of the first five Final Checks to get ready for the Speaking homework assignment.</p>

notices.bt: Word Parts and Head Words, Ch. 3, WPME

notices.ggnrStr: <p>Please note that <b>THIS week's class</b> has been rescheduled to <b><span style="background-color:#ffff33;">Saturday (Feb 28), 9:50-11:25</span></b>. The regular Tuesday schedule will resume next week.</p>

notices.bt: 数字逻辑实验课从第三周开始上课

notices.ggnrStr: <p><span style="font-size:14px;"><img height="544" src="https://learn.tsinghua.edu.cn/b/wlxt/common/downloadFiles?wjid=1991990061_GG_1771953537733276b355262-8496-457c-89ce-89b86797b216&amp;wlkcid=2025-2026-2151369471" width="750"></span></p>

<p style="text-align: center;">Idioms Story:&nbsp;Graffiti Makes Him See Red</p> 
  <p>Study the pictures and then tell a story according to the pictures given.</p>
<p>Final Check, Chapter 28 (MP3): first listen and then recite.</p>

<p>Please study carefully the attached file:<b>&nbsp;</b><span style="color:#ff0033;"><strong>Chapter 28</strong></span><b>&nbsp;from&nbsp;</b><strong><em>Unit 6,&nbsp;Vocabulary Workbook (12,000+ word level)&nbsp;</em></strong><b>to get prepared for Week 1 classes</b><b>. M</b>ake sure you understand everything so as to learn more efficiently, and most importantly, you learn everything off by heart.&nbsp;<b>Reciting&nbsp;the "</b><span style="color:#ff0033;"><strong>Final Check</strong></span><b>"</b>&nbsp;of the chapter&nbsp;is also part of the oral homework assignments for this course. And please listen to the&nbsp;<span style="color:#ff0033;"><strong>recording</strong></span>&nbsp;for the&nbsp;<strong>Final Check</strong>&nbsp;as many times as possible&nbsp; before you start trying to recite it.&nbsp;</p>

<p style="text-align: center;"><strong><em><span style="background-color:#27ae60;">Word Power Made Easy</span></em></strong></p> 
  <p>While you're studing Chapters 3 ~ 7 (P26 ~ P181) and getting ready for week 3 achievement test, please listen to the correspondent MP3 to help you learn more efficiently.</p>

<p style="text-align: center;"><span style="font-size:18px;"><em><strong><span><span style="font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"><span style="background-color:#27ae60;">Cambridge English Readers Stories</span></span></span></strong></em></span></p> 
  <p><span style="font-size:12.0pt"><span style="font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif">Listen to one of the two Cambridge English Readers Stories: <em><strong><span style="background-color:#27ae60;">1. This Time It's Personal</span></strong></em>, and <span style="background:yellow"><span style="color:red">the summary of the story is due in Week 5</span></span>.</span></span></p>

<p style="text-align: center;"><em><strong><span style="font-size:12.0pt"><span style="font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif"><span style="background-color:#27ae60;"><span style="font-size:18px;">Vocabulary Workbook IV</span> (12,000+ word level)</span></span></span></strong></em></p> 
  <p><span style="font-size:12.0pt"><span style="font-family:&quot;Times New Roman&quot;,serif">Study Chapters 1 ~ 5, Unit 1, Vocabulary Workbook IV (12,000+ word level) and get ready for Week 3 achievement test.</span></span>&nbsp;</p>
